name: Hippennasse
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the egg whites and cream. Whip until foamy.
2. In a separate bowl, sift together the confectioner's sugar and flour.
3. Gradually add the sugar-flour mixture to the egg whites and cream, stirring until a smooth paste forms.
4. Using a teaspoon, drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a well-greased baking sheet. Shape each into a small, round mound about 5 inches in diameter.
5. Prepare the basket molds by greasing the bottoms of teacups with butter or oil.
6. Bake cookies at 375°F (190°C) for 2-3 minutes until lightly browned and completely dry. Let cool slightly.
7. Remove from molds and allow to cool completely on a wire rack.
8. Store in an air-tight container until ready to serve.
9. To serve, fill the cooled cookie baskets with fresh fruit such as raspberries. Garnish with strawberry or apricot puree and fresh mint leaves.
